postgresUrl.description: PostgreSQL connection URL. Use ${POSTGRES_URL} env var for secrets.

weaviateUrl.description: Weaviate connection URL. Use ${WEAVIATE_URL} for secrets.

neo4jUrl.description: Neo4j connection URL. Use ${NEO4J_URL} for secrets.

enablePromptRecall.description: Inject BrainClaw recall into the prompt so it becomes the primary Hybrid GraphRAG memory source.

promptRecallTopK.description: How many BrainClaw memories to inject into prompt-time recall.

suppressMemoryBootstrap.description: Remove MEMORY.md from bootstrap prompt context while BrainClaw is the active memory slot.

captureAgentEnd.description: Capture durable assistant decisions/procedures at agent end using MEMORY.md-first backup then BrainClaw upsert.

pythonTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for Python backend calls in milliseconds.

pythonPath.description: Path to Python executable. Defaults to system python3. Use ${OPENCLAW_PYTHON} for env var.

pythonBackendPath.description: Path to openclaw-memory Python package. Required for plugin operation. Use ${OPENCLAW_PYTHON_BACKEND} for env var.

brainclawSecret.description: Shared secret for HMAC-signed identity tokens. Use ${BRAINCLAW_SECRET} for secrets.

operationalMemorySyncEnabled.description: Keep root and agent MEMORY.md operational state blocks aligned with live BrainClaw status.

operationalMemorySyncIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for operational MEMORY.md sync.

operationalMemoryPrimaryAgentId.description: Primary agent whose workspace root MEMORY.md is treated as the canonical operational memory file.

operationalMemoryRootPath.description: Optional explicit path to the canonical root MEMORY.md file used for operational sync.

losslessClawEnabled.description: Enable BrainClaw detection and integration with Lossless-Claw when installed.

losslessClawPluginPath.description: Optional explicit install path for the Lossless-Claw plugin.

losslessClawDbPath.description: Optional explicit path to the Lossless-Claw SQLite database.

losslessClawBootstrapOnStart.description: Run bootstrap discovery/import on service startup when the runtime gate passes.

losslessClawPollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for incremental Lossless-Claw sync.

losslessClawDrillDownEnabled.description: Allow BrainClaw to request Lossless-Claw drill-down evidence when canonical memory indicates LCM provenance.

losslessClawArtifactQuotaBytes.description: Maximum BrainClaw storage budget for imported Lossless-Claw source artifacts.

losslessClawAnchorByteCap.description: Maximum raw anchor bytes to ingest or expand for a single Lossless-Claw artifact.

losslessClawLargeFileMode.description: How BrainClaw handles Lossless-Claw large-file references.

losslessClawTrustMode.description: Trust posture for Lossless-Claw integration. local_readonly is filesystem read-only, not cryptographic attestation.

configSchema.description: All fields are optional at install time. Configure via Control UI after install, or use ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

tools.name: hybrid_graphrag_ingest
tools.description: Ingest a memory event into BrainClaw Hybrid GraphRAG (Vector + Graph).

sync.description: Wait for indexing to complete before returning.

tools.name: hybrid_graphrag_retrieve
tools.description: Retrieve relevant memories from BrainClaw using Hybrid Search (Vector + BM25 + Graph).

tools.name: hybrid_graphrag_leiden
tools.description: Run Leiden Community Detection on the BrainClaw Neo4j graph.

limit.description: Maximum number of communities to detect.

tools.name: lcm_expand
tools.description: Expand a query using the Lossless-Claw Memory (LCM) graph.

tools.name: lcm_describe
tools.description: Describe the current agent memory state based on LCM graph structure.
